items.title: Notre Dame Football Fan Discussion: The Blue-Gold Game
items.summary: We have finally reached our destination this spring, as the Notre Dame Fighting Irish Football team hosts its loyal fans for the annual Blue-Gold Game. It should be a gorgeous day for spring football, with today’s forecast in South Bend being sunny and around 65 degrees come kickoff. Notre Dame will play this game as […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football’s “The Shirt” remains as bad as ever
items.summary: Per tradition, Notre Dame released the 2026 version of “The Shirt” for football season. We don’t need to get too deep in the weeds here about all the reasons that the shirt is bad. There’s a formula every year that they love, but it’s a terrible system for creating clothing. Yes, me being a 47 […]

items.title: 5 things I want to see during Notre Dame’s Blue-Gold Game
items.summary: It’s been a wild week for the Notre Dame football program already, and it’s about to get wilder. With the NFL Draft now in full swing, the annual spring Blue-Gold Game seems like it’s getting lost in the shuffle a little bit. So let’s talk about it a little bit. As with every spring game, […]

items.title: It was a historic night for Notre Dame Football and the NFL Draft
items.summary: History was made Thursday night during the first round of the NFL Draft. Some might say it was “extremely historic,” but I don’t need a grammar lesson from POTUS — so let’s just say it was insanely historic and leave it at that. For the first time ever, the first two running backs selected in […]

items.title: NFL Draft Primer for Notre Dame Football
items.summary: We have finally arrived at the NFL Draft after the incredibly long process, and we get to see where the Notre Dame football players land in the league. The 2026 NFL Draft Round 1 begins Thursday, April 23, at 8 p.m. ET (5 p.m. PT) in Pittsburgh, PA, broadcast on ESPN, ABC, and NFL Network. Rounds 2–3 follow on Friday, […]

items.title: Why does Notre Dame want a 24 team college football playoff?
items.summary: Just like it used to be with conference realignment, every college football offseason now sees the potential for tweaks to the college football playoff. Notre Dame, as a conference unto itself, is a big part of these conversations and votes. Recently, they had their annual spring meeting for the CFP, and expansion to the playoff […]
